emergencySupplies.sql_template: SELECT ID, MATERIAL_NAME FROM {table_name} WHERE MATERIAL_STATUS IN ('0', '2') FETCH FIRST {number} ROWS ONLY

rescueTeam.sql_template: SELECT ID, TEAM_NAME FROM {table_name} WHERE BUSINESS_AREA = '{business_area}' ORDER BY TEAM_TYPE ASC, TEAM_LEVEL ASC FETCH FIRST {number} ROWS ONLY

emergencyExpert.sql_template: SELECT ID, EXPERT_NAME FROM {table_name} WHERE BUSINESS_AREA = '{business_area}' ORDER BY TITLE ASC FETCH FIRST {number} ROWS ONLY

fireFightingFacilities.sql_template: SELECT ID, NAME, LATITUDE_LONGITUDE FROM {table_name} WHERE LATITUDE_LONGITUDE IS NOT NULL

shelter.sql_template: SELECT ID, SHELTER_NAME, LON_AND_LAT FROM {table_name} WHERE LON_AND_LAT IS NOT NULL

medicalInstitution.sql_template: SELECT ID, INSTITUTION_NAME, LOCAL_POS FROM {table_name} ORDER BY INSTITUTION_TYPE ASC, INSTITUTION_LEVEL ASC FETCH FIRST {number} ROWS ONLY

rescueOrganization.sql_template: SELECT ID, INSTITUTION_NAME, LOCAL_POS FROM {table_name} WHERE LOCAL_POS IS NOT NULL

protectionTarget.sql_template: SELECT ID, TARGET_NAME, LOCAL_POS FROM {table_name} WHERE LOCAL_POS IS NOT NULL
